betterquesting:10.desc:8:
A key part of CropsNH is improving the stats of your crops. There is always a chance for this to occur whenever a new crop grows - whether by self propagation or crossing...

§lGrowth§r:
§2Improves growth speed§r
- Increases the number of progress points per growth tick by up to about 525% with some variation depending on the tier of the crop.
§4Can cause weeds to spawn§r
- When growth is above 23 (or 7 for Necrobloom), crops will begin spreading weeds and diseases to nearby crops.
- You can prevent this by either using Weed-EX or by increasing the resistance stat.

§lGain§r:
§2Improves harvest size§r
- Up to 2.5x per harvest at 31 gain.
- Has a gain/31 chance of increasing the stack size of any drop by 1.

§lResistance§r:
§2Improves seed harvest chances§r
- A resistance of 10 will guarantee a seed drop when harvesting a mature crop with a reinforced spade.
- This scales by rate of resistance/10:
  - 20: 2 seeds
  - 25: 2 seeds + 50% chance for a 3rd
  - 31: 3 seeds + 10% chance for a 4th
- A resistance of 31 will guarantee a seed drop even without a spade.
§2Increases weed resistance§r
- When a crop's growth is above 23, resistance will prevent weed spreading as long as it's greater than or equal to the growth stat.
§2Improves a crop's resistance to diseases§r
- Each point reduces a crop's chance of becoming infected.
- With 31 resistance, crops are immune to diseases.
